evals.prompt: Show me the flow for the changes on this branch before I approve it.
evals.expected_output: Selects flow-map mode, states inspected scope, renders changed runtime paths, and marks changed steps.

evals.prompt: Xray this codebase and show me risky flows.
evals.expected_output: Selects x-ray mode, discovers entry points, scopes the run, diagrams selected flows, and reports structural risks.
